--- Menu Page: https://www.gatecitybrewingcompany.com/menus ---
ARTILLERY ROOM MENU | gatecitybrewingco
top of page
Risen from the ashes in the spirit of history
The Artillery Room proudly serves house-crafted cocktails.
ARTILLERY ROOM MENU
COCKTAIL LIST
THE HUSSY // 7.3% ABV
Vodka Soda With  Key Lime Juice.
GIN MAKES ME SIN // 12% ABV
This deep purple gin cocktail is mixed with black currant and lemon with just a touch of agave simple syrup to balance the sharp tart flavors.
SWEATER WEATHER // 20% ABV
This spirit forward cocktail will warm you up from the inside out.  Made with our bourbon, blood orange, a splash of cherry and a dash of cinnamon it is the perfect cocktail to spice up a cold winter night.
SUGAR PLUM FAIRY // 16.3% ABV
Vodka, Plum, Marionberry, & Brown Sugar
MANGO TANGO FOXTROT //
Gate City Gin, Mango, & Lemon.
PINEAPPLE UPSIDE DOWN
Vodka, Pineapple, Sweet Cherry, & Lime
$10
BEER LIST
COPPERHEAD // 5.2% ABV
American Amber Ale. Flavor: Caramel, Dry, Slightly Bitter // Ingredients: Cascade Hops, Caramel Malts.
PRETTY BIRD // 7% ABV
New England/Hazy IPA
Pretty Bird is a NE IPA featuring Ahtanum, Citra, Loral and Sabro hops.  This unique blend allows you to triple stamp a double stamp and offers up incredibly tropical and citrus flavors with subtle earthy and cedar notes.  Pretty Bird will make you think of some place warm, where beautiful people flock like the salmon of Capistrano, a little place called Aspen.  Consuming this beer will not make your pet's head fall off.
bottom of page
